# Web component patterns catalog

All patterns are imported from 'platform/forms-system/src/js/web-component-patterns'.

## Address

- `addressUI` *(function)* — Web component v3 uiSchema for address
- `addressSchema` *(function)* — Web component schema for address

## Arn

- `arnUI` *(function)* — Web component v3 for Alien registration number (ARN)

- `arnOrVaFileNumberUI` *(function)* — Web components for Alien registration number or VA File Number
- `arnOrVaFileNumberSchema` *(object)* — Schema for ARN or VA File Number

## ArrayBuilder

- `arrayBuilderItemFirstPageTitleUI` *(function)* — Title for the first page of an item in an array builder

- `arrayBuilderYesNoUI` *(function)* — arrayPath: string,
